productName: Super Fog - Loud - Ion - 1g (1pk) - Hawaiian Dutch - SAT - Haze
description: A sativa vape cartridge filled with Hawaiian Dutch oil — smooth, flavorful vapor in a discreet, no-torch, push-button format that goes wherever you go. Smooth, discreet, and flavorful — bright, citrusy-spicy notes, with an upbeat, talkative energy.
